title: Rule Teach
intendedTensionBeat: The first valid action visibly advances water, proving that acting advances danger while thinking is free.
intendedReleaseBeat: The puppy is rescued quickly after the rule is understood.
expectedPath: Take the clearly framed opening group, observe water advance because of the action, then take the next readable rescue-route clear to extract the puppy.
expectedFailMode: Failure is not the lesson; if the player fails, the board is too punishing or unclear.
designNotes: L00 may be sparser than normal, but it must still look like real gameplay, not isolated teaching moves.
